LiCoO2.paragraph_string: LiCoO2 was synthesized by mixing Li2CO3 and Co3O4 in a 1:3 molar ratio and calcining at 850°C for 24 hours in air.

LiFePO4.paragraph_string: LiFePO4 was synthesized by ball-milling Li2CO3, FeC2O4, and NH4H2PO4 and sintering at 700°C for 12h under argon atmosphere.

BaTiO3.paragraph_string: BaTiO3 was prepared from BaCO3 and TiO2 by calcination at 1100°C for 4h in air.
BaTiO3 nanoparticles were synthesized hydrothermally from Ba(OH)2 and TiO2 at 200°C for 12h in a Teflon-lined autoclave.

Fe2O3.paragraph_string: Alpha-Fe2O3 was obtained by precipitation from FeCl3 solution with NaOH, followed by calcination at 400°C for 2h.

NaFeO2.paragraph_string: NaFeO2 was prepared by calcination of Na2CO3 and Fe2O3 at 800°C for 10h in air.

LiNiO2.paragraph_string: LiNiO2 was synthesized by mixing LiOH and Ni(OH)2 and heating at 700°C for 12h under oxygen atmosphere.
